title: ChangeAlertsRecipe
description:
A SEPAL Change Alerts recipe. CCDC-based per-pixel change detection that compares current observations to a CCDC harmonic-regression reference and emits alert pixels when the model fit fails over a confirmation window.

**Pipeline.** (1) Load `reference` (a CCDC recipe or its exported asset). (2) Build a recent observation collection from `sources` over the calibration + monitoring windows ending at `date.monitoringEnd`. (3) Per pixel, compute residuals against the CCDC model; flag changes where residuals exceed `changeAlertsOptions.minConfidence` σ across `numberOfObservations` consecutive scenes.

reference.title: ChangeAlertsReference
reference.description: CCDC reference — either a SEPAL CCDC recipe or an Earth Engine asset id of a CCDC export.

date.title: ChangeAlertsDate
date.description: Monitoring + calibration windows. Calibration runs from `monitoringEnd - monitoringDuration - calibrationDuration` to `monitoringEnd - monitoringDuration`; monitoring runs from there to `monitoringEnd` (exclusive).

options.description: Mixed optical/radar/planet processing options. Loosely structured.

minConfidence.description: Minimum residual magnitude (σ) to count as a change. Default `5`.

numberOfObservations.description: Number of recent observations to evaluate. Default `3`.

minNumberOfChanges.description: Minimum count of qualifying observations to confirm an alert. Default `3`.

mustBeConfirmedInMonitoring.description: Require the change to be confirmed within the monitoring window. Default `true`.

mustBeStableBeforeChange.description: Require the calibration window to be stable before flagging. Default `true`.

mustStayChanged.description: Require the change to persist (not revert) for confirmation. Default `true`.
